title: phalaris minor var. genuina
intro: Phalaris minor var. genuina, also known as common canary grass or phalaris minor, is a type of annual grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Phalaris minor var. genuina include its ability to help manage fever, reduce swelling, and treat urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of Phalaris minor var. genuina typically involve making a tea from the leaves and stems, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
